title: Fix Admin Login Authentication Failure

requirements.text: Fix the admin login authentication so that valid credentials are accepted and the admin dashboard is accessible without showing 'Login failed. Please try again.' for correct passwords.

quotes: Login failed please try again isko theek karo

acceptanceCriteria: Entering the correct admin password and clicking 'Sign in' successfully authenticates and opens the admin dashboard.
The 'Login failed. Please try again.' error message does NOT appear when valid credentials are submitted.
The error message still appears correctly when an incorrect password is entered.
The admin session token is persisted in localStorage after successful login.
The backend adminLogin function returns a successful session token for the correct password.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Preserve the existing dark/gold visual theme of the Admin Login card.
nonGoals: Changing the admin login UI layout or styling.
